content.en:
"I joined the Heavenly Wind Sea, naturally I want to use the rules of the Heavenly Wind Sea to comprehend the rules of the Eternal Heaven and Earth, wouldn't it be stupid not to take advantage of such conditions?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Therefore, he would not choose to rely on endless years to slowly comprehend, which in itself was just the helplessness of ordinary invincible people.

Of course, even if they are high-level members of the Heavenly Wind Sea, they are qualified to participate in the rules of the Heavenly Wind Sea, but they need to contribute a lot.

Even for the most ordinary regular celestial objects, it takes a contribution point to comprehend a realm year, 120,000 contribution points to comprehend a realm era, and more than 10 million contribution points to comprehend a dark calendar time.

Therefore, if you want to comprehend the rules and heavenly objects for a long time, it is an extravagant hope, and many invincible people do not have so much contribution value.

Ye Tian's cumulative contribution value has reached hundreds of thousands of points, but now the contribution value in his hand is almost not spent, after all, it doesn't cost much to buy hundreds of top-grade robbery stones, and it is only tens of thousands of contribution points.

In addition, he bought some other treasures and gave them to his family, such as exchanging treasures such as the emperor's blood, and spent some contribution points.

But now, he still has 260,000 contributions left.

So many contribution points were enough for him to comprehend for a long time, and he could even comprehend the rules of the Eternal Heaven and Earth at one time, thus creating an invincible ancestral technique and stepping into the realm of a fifth-rank invincible.

--------------

Tianlin Realm.

Ye Tian's copy body came here again, and then came to the headquarters of the Heavenly Wind Sea, the Windless Mountain.

Of course, with Ye Tian's status, he can only enter the periphery of the Windless Mountain, and if he wants to enter the inner perimeter, he needs at least the status of an elite-level member.

At this time, Ye Tian came to Jiuyang Mountain in the Windless Mountain, where there was a regular heavenly object called Jiuyang Fish.

The rule of the Jiuyang Fish contains three eternal rules of heaven and earth, namely strength, defense and speed, which is the most basic but also the most important rule, so there are many invincible people who have comprehended the rule of the Jiuyang Fish, and this kind of rule is also the most suitable for Ye Tian.

If you want to comprehend the Nine Yang Fish, the cost is higher than that of ordinary rule celestial objects, and it takes three contribution points to comprehend a realm year.

Jiuyang Mountain.

Ye Tian stood in front of a third-order gate, and only after handing his badge to an invincible person guarding here to watch it was allowed to enter this third-order gate.

Strictly speaking, the Jiuyang Fish is not on Jiuyang Mountain, but in a special time and space opposite to Jiuyang Mountain, for example, you can shuttle to that time and space through the third-order gate, so as to comprehend Jiuyang Fish, otherwise you can't enter it at all.

Tianfeng Hai attaches great importance to any kind of regular celestial object, for example, near the third-order gate, Ye Tian sensed many invincible people, and the aura of many of them was far beyond his imagination, and he could definitely kill him instantly.

Wow!

Ye Tian passed through the third-order gate and came to a special time and space.

Here, one by one, the suspended lotus platforms floated in the void, and some of the invincible ones were already sitting cross-legged on some lotus platforms, and they were contemplating the eternal rules.

And in the middle of this space-time, a big black fish that spreads for hundreds of millions of miles is writhing, but it is bound by chains, and it can't leave here at all.

"This is the Nine Sunfish?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

From the outside, it was as if this regular artifact was not a dead thing, but a real creature.

But Ye Tian used the copying talent to probe, but he didn't find any talent, proving that this big black fish was not a living being.

In fact, most of the regular celestial objects have been born for a long time, and they will take on the appearance of various living beings, but they are still regular celestial objects, a kind of treasure, not a living being.

The Jiuyang Fish is blocked, and it is impossible to comprehend the eternal rules carried by the Jiuyang Fish from other places, so you must sit on the lotus platform and connect with the Jiuyang Fish through the lotus platform, so as to comprehend the eternal rules of the Jiuyang Fish.

Ye Tian chose an empty lotus platform, sat on it, and immediately his consciousness spread to the Jiuyang fish through the lotus platform.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's consciousness is observing the entire Jiuyang Fish, in the consciousness perception, the entire Jiuyang Fish is like the embodiment of the rules, and it is an eternal rule, far beyond the rules of the exotic world, the so-called avenue of the exotic world is simply pediatric here, far less than a trace of rules here.

Strength, speed, defense.

Ye Tian sensed these three eternal rules, and truly felt the vast sea of eternal rules.

Three eternal rules, Ye Tian did not hesitate to choose the power rule first, speed and defense can enhance a certain combat effectiveness, but more is to save his life, and Ye Tian does not need to save his life, he usually fights with a copy body, even if the copy body falls, it will not have much impact, so the strength is more beneficial to him.

If he comprehended the eternal rules of strength, he could try to create a power-type invincible ancestral technique, which would increase his combat effectiveness.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to comprehend the eternal rules of power.

Compared with other invincibles, Ye Tian's advantage is not very great, although he has the ultimate power ancestral endowment, but it is not very helpful to comprehend the eternal rules of power, unless he can obtain the talent of eternal power, he can help him quickly comprehend the eternal rules of power.

"Maybe I still have a good chance of getting the Eternal Strength talent!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There may not be anyone with the Eternal Strength Talent in the Tianlin Realm, but there are invincible people with the Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowment, although the number is extremely rare, but if he spends a long time looking for it, he can definitely find many invincible people with the Ultimate Strength Ancestral Endowment.

If you copy and fuse a large number of Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowments, you may be able to safely fuse them into an Eternal Power Talent.

"Let's try it here first, and then see the effect!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Year after year passed, Ye Tian and the other invincible people had been comprehending the eternal rules, but the progress was not fast.

However, this is also very normal, even if there are regular celestial objects, but the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea still need to comprehend for a long time before they can be promoted to the fifth rank invincible, and even spend a long time doing tasks one by one in order to accumulate contribution points.

For the invincible, let alone one or two dark time, even if it is a time of the Great Tribulation, it is an incomparably short time, and for the invincible, a tribulation period is a relatively long time.

Subsequently, he communicated with the other invincible people in the Tianfeng Sea, and roughly understood the time when those invincible people in the Tianfeng Sea comprehended the eternal rules.

Even if the general invincible person has been comprehending the rules of the heavenly things, he needs at least three dark calendar times, and a very high level of comprehension also needs one dark calendar time, after all, to be able to be promoted to invincible, the gap in understanding is not very large.

But if you have been contemplating the three dark calendars, how much contribution value does it take, and few invincible people have so many contribution points.

Therefore, these invincible people have accumulated contribution points over a long period of time, and once they have made up some contribution points, they will come to the enlightenment.

Therefore, many Heavenly Wind Sea's invincible people cultivated tens of thousands of eons before they broke through to the fifth-rank invincible realm.

"If I have been contemplating a dark calendar time, in order to comprehend the cost of Jiuyang Fish, I need at least more than 30 million contribution points, and I only have 260,000 contribution points, it seems that I have thought too much, and a mere 260,000 contribution points cannot help me comprehend the eternal rules at one time. Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

He can hunt the robber beast again and again, earn a huge amount of contribution points, and then come to the Nine Yang Fish, but it also takes time to find the robber beast.

Or, he went to pick up tasks that could earn a lot of contribution points at one time, but those tasks were not something he could complete, unless he had someone with him in the Heavenly Wind Sea, he could earn enough contribution points, but not necessarily faster than he hunted the beast himself.

"It's better to try to fuse a large number of Ultimate Power Ancestral Endowments and fuse them into Eternal Power Talents, which is more reliable!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
